antithesis_summary: Remove value embeddings entirely and let plain attention plus residual mixing do the work.
label: Value embeddings vs simplicity
thesis_summary: Keep alternating value embeddings because the current best completed run used them and may have gained extra information flow per token.
why_active: The incumbent spends roughly one third of its parameters on alternating value embeddings, and the March 12, 2026 branch-local no-VE attempt aborted before training, so this mechanism still lacks a clean empirical opposition inside the 300-second budget.
